scenes.narration: Ye Session 10 of 10 hai Caching series me — aaj focus: cache interview masterclass. Bhai, ek mistake jo 90% engineers karte hain — 8 second me batata hu.
Common mistake: invalidation samjhe bina production me lagaya — scale pe pakda gaya. Aaj ke session me exact reason aur fix dono dekhenge.
Soch tu ek student ka brain — important formulas saamne notebook me likhe (cache), kam-use ki cheezein library me (DB). Cache hit = saamne mil gaya, miss = library jaana padega.
Core mechanism: cache-aside, TTL, stampede — ye sab terms aaj clear karenge with concrete examples. Yaad rakh, Caching ka design choice = scale + cost trade-off.

Tunables: TTL 60s-1h hot path, eviction policy match access pattern (LRU temporal locality, LFU stable popularity). Memory budget 10-20% of working set. Cache:DB latency ratio 100:1. Tunables touched: cache-aside, TTL, stampede.
Real example: Twitter timeline cache 100K QPS Memcached pe. Discord 4M concurrent users session-state Redis sharded across 200 nodes. Instagram feed cache hit-rate 99.5%.
Interview line: cache-aside, TTL, stampede — ye yaad rakh. Session 10/10 complete. series complete — ab interview me confidently answer kar sakte ho.
